introduction: An advanced stage of chronic liver disease associated with histological evidence of hepatocyte degeneration, nodularity and fibrosis.

features: Fluid retention e.g., Ascites and peripheral oedema
Peripheral stigmata of chronic liver disease.

goals: Symptomatic relief from anaemia, fatigue and oedema
non_drug: Encourage high fibre and low salt diet
drug: Diuretics: Spironolactone tablets 25 - 100 mg orally 12 hourly
Prevention of variceal bleeding: Propranolol 40 - 80 mg orally daily
Isosorbide mononitrate 10 mg orally thrice daily

prevention: Immunization against hepatitis A and B
